mitre_details.name: Monitor Process State
mitre_details.impact: Attacker monitored process state to identify targets

mitre_details.name: Manipulation of Control
mitre_details.impact: Attacker manipulated control systems to alter physical processes

mitre_details.name: Denial of Service
mitre_details.impact: Attacker disrupted availability of ICS components

mitre_details.name: Modify Parameter
mitre_details.impact: Attacker modified PLC parameters to cause physical damage

recommended_actions.action: Block source IPs at perimeter firewall: 192.168.1.10, 192.168.9.99, 10.0.0.55
Isolate affected PLCs from network: PLC_01, PLC_02, PLC_03
Switch affected PLCs to manual/local control mode
Verify IP-MAC bindings on all trusted devices
Enable dynamic ARP inspection on all switches
Enable rate limiting — max 50 packets/second per device
Force password reset on all SCADA operator accounts
Conduct full forensic analysis of affected devices
Review and update network segmentation policies
File regulatory incident report within 72 hours
Deploy network segmentation between OT and IT networks
Implement multi-factor authentication on all ICS access points

executive_summary: SentinelOT detected a CRITICAL severity security incident involving 20 suspicious events across 5 industrial devices. Attack types identified: SPOOFING, UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS, DDoS, COMMAND_INJECTION. Primary affected devices: PLC_01, PLC_02, PLC_03. Attacks originated from 5 unique source IP(s) including 192.168.1.10, 192.168.9.99. Average model confidence: 99.6%. Immediate containment actions have been recommended. Full forensic investigation is advised.
